name: Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant
title: "Feather of Proclamation" Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant
desc: A Qucusaurus whose body has attained a supernatural form due to enduring forces that the bodies of modern Saurians cannot control.

attributes.source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with the Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant

skills.name: Rising Scorchwind
skills.desc: Deals ? ?, and attaches 2 stacks of Flying Swirl to self.

skills.name: Goldflame Detonation
skills.desc: Deals ? ?, and deals 1 Piercing DMG to all opponent's off-field characters. Attaches 1 stack of Goldflame State to self.

skills.name: Ancient Bloodline
skills.desc: (Passive) At the start of even-numbered Action Phases, attach 1 stack of Goldflame State to self.
